properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: At all times All times I will bless the Lord At all times :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Strong and courageous Mighty in battle He’s fighting for us The victory is ours

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Put on your armor The sword of the spirit Our weapon is worship The victory is ours Shout out to Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: At all times All times I will bless the Lord At all times :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Praise Him in the valley Praise Him on the mountain Praise Him in the heavens The victory is ours

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Worship while you’re weeping Worship while you’re waiting Worship while you’re winning The victory is ours Shout out to Jesus Shout out to Jesus

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /: At all times All times I will bless the Lord At all times :/ 5x
